title: Agent Teams
description: A lead agent can spawn teammate loops and coordinate through file-backed mailboxes.

steps.content: Split this task: one agent checks tests, another reviews docs.
steps.annotation: The request needs parallel work with separate responsibilities.

steps.content: I'll spawn teammates with narrow roles and coordinate their updates through the message bus.
steps.annotation: The lead keeps orchestration authority while delegating execution.
A teammate thread starts with its own simplified loop.

steps.content: {"to":"test-runner","message":"Run the focused test suite and summarize failures."}
steps.annotation: The lead sends work through the file-backed mailbox.
MessageBus persists the handoff as JSONL.
The teammate replies without sharing the lead's whole conversation.
The lead polls its own inbox for teammate updates.
Mailbox messages re-enter the lead loop as tool results.
